productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Striped White Shirt
description: Composition White shirt with blue toned stripes made of 97% cotton and 3% spandex, has full sleeves with double buttoned cuffs, spread collar with removable stiffeners, buttoned placket with pearlescent white buttons and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash delicate Wash and dry inside out Line dry in shade Warm iron Dry clean delicate Do not wring, do not tumble dry, do not bleach A jacquard weave and subtly toned blue stripes gives this shirt an exclusive, luxurious look, it's a cut above the standard formal shirt. Impeccable construction, attention to detail and smart stripes place this shirt firmly ahead of the pack &ndash wear with confidence tucked into formal trousers. Model statistics The model wears a size M in shirts with height 6' and shoulders 18"
